3045560.name: Gears Of Time
3045560.description:
Game created In Creanavarra.
Dungeon Crawler with Platforming, Action, and Bullet Hell elements with a Gear-Like Hability System.
The player must escape from a large tower after having stolen the hourglass. You must go down the different floors that make up the tower, avoiding its traps, fighting with its guardians and solving the necessary puzzles to escape alive. The character will acquire new objects and skills that will help him in all these situations and which he can combine to obtain powerful synergies.
You will manage your life, your dash and the power to slow down time with gears.

This game is a university project so it is not completely polished, we still want to hear your opinion of the game, whether good or bad.
3045560.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
